content: Cloudflare Pages Functions (on Workers runtime) offer unlimited bandwidth on free tier, 100K requests/day free, <5ms cold starts, but non-full-Node runtime (some npm packages with native bindings won't work). Vercel Hobby free tier: 1M invocations/month, 100 GB-hours compute, 10s max duration, 100GB bandwidth/month, but Hobby plan is non-commercial/personal-use only per ToS. For simple response caching of Open-Meteo calls, either works; Cloudflare's free tier is more generous and has no commercial-use restriction.
